/usr/local/cuda/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler -O3 -DNDEBUG --generate-code=arch=compute_52,code=[compute_52,sm_52] -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink CMakeFiles/acc_spmm_bench.dir/benchmark/benchmark.cpp.o -o CMakeFiles/acc_spmm_bench.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  libacc_spmm_core.a  -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
